nodes.label: Maison Locht Brand
nodes.rationale: Fondatrice Belgo-Haïtienne, grandi Sénégal/Congo/Guinée. Matières wax/pagnes/fouta. Patchworks = routes = hommage à Haïti. Héritage vivant.

nodes.label: Order Flow (3-step form to shipping)
nodes.rationale: Landing → choix sac → 3 étapes formulaire → email auto → tracker statut. Statuts: pending→payment_received→confirmed→shipped.

nodes.label: AutoRefresh Component
nodes.rationale: Dispatch ml-refresh event after refresh. AdminShell listens for this event for the 'updated X seconds ago' counter. Must not remove the dispatch.

nodes.label: AdminShell Component
nodes.rationale: Bottom nav fixed mobile (md:hidden). Content has pb-28 md:pb-8 to not be hidden behind nav.

nodes.label: AdminSkeletonShell Component
nodes.rationale: Static header for loading.tsx files. No client logic, no state.

nodes.label: QuickAction Component
nodes.rationale: Inline status progression on admin home. Calls updateOrderStatus directly. Only for positive progression (no cancellation).

nodes.label: OrdersTable Component
nodes.rationale: CSV export delimiter ; (European Excel standard). Date format YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm. Statuses in French. Mobile: tabs Actions/Infos in expanded row. Print invoice button in Actions tab.

nodes.label: NoteColis Component
nodes.rationale: Visible in OrdersTable expanded if order.why_locht. Generates personalized text to slip into parcel.

nodes.label: PiecesProvider Component
nodes.rationale: Provides pieces and availableCount to Hero and Collection. Single source of truth for client-side inventory.

nodes.label: Design System — Luxe Éditorial (Crème & Bleu Marine)
nodes.rationale: References: Belgian magazines, Loro Piana, Brunello Cucinelli. Editorial luxury direction.
nodes.norm_label: design system — luxe editorial (creme & bleu marine)

nodes.label: Typography System (Cormorant Garamond + DM Sans + JetBrains Mono)
nodes.norm_label: typography system (cormorant garamond + dm sans + jetbrains mono)

nodes.label: Bug: OrderStatus export type in use server (juin 2026)
nodes.rationale: export type in 'use server' compiled by Turbopack as value export → ReferenceError → 500 on all admin server actions. tsc does not detect it. Rule: never export type from use server; import types from lib/.
nodes.norm_label: bug: orderstatus export type in use server (juin 2026)

nodes.label: Bug: Mixed image URLs in emails
nodes.rationale: pieces.image_url can be full Supabase URL or relative /images/… path. Always normalize via emailImg() in lib/email-from.ts before email img tag.
nodes.norm_label: bug: mixed image urls in emails

nodes.label: Bug: Resend emails.send() does not throw
nodes.rationale: Returns {data, error}. Must check error property, otherwise silent failure.
nodes.norm_label: bug: resend emails.send() does not throw

nodes.label: Bug: Two Resend accounts confusion
nodes.rationale: dimitrikarel77@gmail.com (maisonlocht.com verified = PROD/Vercel) vs Lumina account (luminamodels.ca). .env.local must use dimitrikarel77 key, else 403 locally.

nodes.label: Bug: Dev local iPhone hotspot NAT64/IPv6
nodes.rationale: Edge middleware may return fetch failed to Supabase + image optimizer blocks NAT64 IPs. Local-only artifact. Restart dev server or switch to IPv4 WiFi.
nodes.norm_label: bug: dev local iphone hotspot nat64/ipv6

nodes.label: Facturation — Invoice PDF Feature
nodes.rationale: Delivered. HTML print-optimized invoice, printable as PDF from admin. Hidden iframe technique — click injects HTML → iframe.contentWindow.print(). Zero external dependencies. Numbering: LOCHT-2026-001 → F-2026-001. Tax mention neutral pending lawyer/accountant decision.

nodes.label: why_locht Field — Private Customer Motivation
nodes.rationale: Private data. Used internally only (note colis, tracking mirror). Never display publicly.

nodes.label: Supabase RLS — Row Level Security
nodes.rationale: RLS enabled on all tables. Admin reads via service role only, except GET /commande/[code] (public limited by reference).

nodes.label: Order Status Workflow (En attente → Payée → Confirmée → Expédiée)
nodes.norm_label: order status workflow (en attente → payee → confirmee → expediee)

nodes.label: Expedition Flow — Ship & Notify in one click
nodes.rationale: Choose carrier + tracking number → Expédier & notifier → saves tracking, marks shipped, sends email. All in one click.
nodes.norm_label: expedition flow — ship & notify in one click

nodes.label: Two-click Confirmation UX Pattern
nodes.rationale: Important buttons require 2 clicks: 1st click turns button golden showing Confirmer?, 2nd executes. Auto-resets after few seconds to prevent accidental actions.

nodes.label: Email Resend Options (Communications client)
nodes.source_location: Renvoyer un email à la cliente

nodes.label: Auto-refresh — no manual reload needed
nodes.source_location: La page se rafraîchit toute seule

nodes.label: Order Filters (search, sort, status tags, late orders)
nodes.rationale: Late orders = pending payment > 3 days → to follow up.
nodes.norm_label: order filters (search, sort, status tags, late orders)
